001package applicationMain;
002
003/**
004 * Supporting validation test class for ASU username rules.
005 *
006 * <p>This class provides focused validation checks for username constraints used by
007 * post/reply author fields. It is included as supporting evidence in StudentPostTests.
008 */
009public class UsernameValidationTest {
010    
011    /**
012     * Executes a sequence of username validation checks.
013     *
014     * @param args command-line arguments (not used)
015     */
016    public static void main(String[] args) {
017        System.out.println("=== Username Validation Tests ===\n");
018        
019        // Test 1: Empty username
020        testValidation("", "Empty username");
021        
022        // Test 2: Username with only spaces
023        testValidation("   ", "Spaces only");
024        
025        // Test 3: Username too short (less than 4 chars)
026        testValidation("abc", "Too short (3 chars)");
027        
028        // Test 4: Username too long (more than 20 chars)
029        testValidation("abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz", "Too long (26 chars)");
030        
031        // Test 5: Username with special characters
032        testValidation("user@123", "Special char (@)");
033        
034        // Test 6: Username with spaces in middle
035        testValidation("user name", "Space in middle");
036        
037        // Test 7: Username with leading spaces
038        testValidation("  user123", "Leading spaces");
039        
040        // Test 8: Username with trailing spaces
041        testValidation("user123  ", "Trailing spaces");
042        
043        // Test 9: Valid username (4 chars)
044        testValidation("user", "Valid (4 chars)");
045        
046        // Test 10: Valid username (20 chars)
047        testValidation("abcdefghij1234567890", "Valid (20 chars)");
048        
049        // Test 11: Valid username (alphanumeric)
050        testValidation("User123", "Valid (alphanumeric)");
051        
052        // Test 12: Valid username with numbers only
053        testValidation("12345678", "Valid (numbers only)");
054        
055        // Test 13: Valid username with letters only
056        testValidation("username", "Valid (letters only)");
057        
058        System.out.println("\n=== All tests completed ===");
059    }
060    
061    /**
062     * Helper that runs one validation case and prints pass/fail output details.
063     *
064     * @param username candidate username input
065     * @param testDescription label for the validation case
066     */
067    private static void testValidation(String username, String testDescription) {
068        String error = ValidationUtil.validateAsuUserId(username);
069        
070        if (error != null) {
071            System.out.println("❌ FAIL: " + testDescription);
072            System.out.println("   Input: \"" + username + "\"");
073            System.out.println("   Error: " + error);
074        } else {
075            System.out.println("✅ PASS: " + testDescription);
076            System.out.println("   Input: \"" + username + "\"");
077        }
078        System.out.println();
079    }
080}
